question:
Portsmouth FC vs. Millwall FC: Both Teams to Score

Description: In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Portsmouth FC and Millwall FC, scheduled for November 22 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Portsmouth FC and Millwall FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.efl.com/
event_title:
Portsmouth FC vs. Millwall FC: Both Teams to Score

Description: In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Portsmouth FC and Millwall FC, scheduled for November 22 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Portsmouth FC and Millwall FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.efl.com/

evidences.title: Portsmouth v Millwall: Predictions, tips, bet builder as Pompey turn Fratton Park into lion's den
evidences.content: Millwall, on the other hand, have won four straight head-to-head encounters with Pompey. However, their recent away record fails to fill us with confidence, considering they’ve won one measly game out of seven on the road. Bearing all that in mind, we’re backing the draw. ## Both teams to score Portsmouth have scored 36 goals in the Championship this season – 22 of them have come at Fratton Park. In their last four at home, Pompey have rattled the net 13 times, scoring four times against Coventry and Swansea alone. Millwall are also capable of scoring. The London outfit have been kept at bay just once in their previous five outings. ## Portsmouth corners over 5.5 [...] ## Portsmouth corners over 5.5 When it comes to their home form, Portsmouth are a dangerous attacking outfit. This is good news for all of you stat geeks out there who count corners. Pompey have seen over 5.5 corners for 11 home games in a row – including 20 across their last three at Fratton Park. ## Booking points over 42.5 Portsmouth’s last six games at home have delivered in bookings almost in the same value as they have in goals. There’s been 26 bookings across the last six games at Fratton Park. When you cou...
